activities_projects.title: Consumer Rights Case Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To analyze real-life situations involving consumer rights.
steps: Read a short case about a defective product.
Identify which consumer right was violated.
Suggest the action the consumer should take.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply consumer rights concepts to practical situations.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check correct identification of rights and logical solution.

activities_projects.title: Product Label Investigation
activities_projects.objective: To examine product labels and evaluate consumer information.
steps: Examine labels for MRP, expiry date, and certification marks.
List missing or unclear information, if any.
Write why label transparency is important.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand importance of complete product information.

activities_projects.title: Complaint Letter with Legal Reference
activities_projects.objective: To draft a structured consumer complaint.
steps: Imagine purchasing a faulty electronic item.
Write a complaint letter mentioning relevant consumer rights.
Suggest expected compensation or solution.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate format, clarity, and reference to rights.

activities_projects.title: Misleading Advertisement Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To critically analyze advertisements for misleading claims.
steps: Select one advertisement.
Identify exaggerated or misleading claims.
Explain how it may affect consumers.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking about advertising practices.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess clarity of analysis and logical explanation.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Court Structure Study
activities_projects.objective: To understand the hierarchy of consumer courts in India.
steps: Prepare a flowchart of district, state, and national consumer commissions.
Write one function of each level.
Explain the process of filing a complaint.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand consumer dispute redressal mechanism.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check accuracy of structure and explanation.

activities_projects.title: Right to Information Application
activities_projects.objective: To connect right to information with consumer protection.
steps: Identify a product with unclear details.
List questions a consumer should ask before buying.
Explain how information protects consumers.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of information in fair trade.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess relevance of questions and explanation.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Awareness Campaign Plan
activities_projects.objective: To design a simple awareness campaign.
steps: Choose one consumer right.
Create a poster or slogan explaining it.
Present how awareness can reduce exploitation.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate creativity and clarity of message.

activities_projects.title: Common Consumer Problems Survey
activities_projects.objective: To identify common consumer issues in the locality.
steps: Survey five people about recent consumer problems.
Categorize problems under relevant rights.
Suggest possible solutions.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect theory with real-life consumer issues.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess completeness of survey and solution quality.

activities_projects.title: Standardization Marks Study
activities_projects.objective: To study quality certification marks in India.
steps: Identify marks like ISI, AGMARK, Hallmark on products.
Explain what each mark stands for.
Write why certification is important.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand importance of quality standards.

activities_projects.title: Digital Consumer Rights Discussion
activities_projects.objective: To explore consumer rights in online shopping.
steps: List problems faced in online purchases.
Identify relevant consumer rights for each problem.
Suggest precautions while shopping online.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand consumer protection in digital markets.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess logical connections and practical suggestions.
